data.title: Add preplanning Agent-dispatch negative assertions to test-skill-nesting-depth.sh
data.description:
## What
Add two negative-constraint assertions to tests/skills/test-skill-nesting-depth.sh verifying that preplanning/SKILL.md no longer contains Skill tool invocations for design work:

1. test_preplanning_no_design_wireframe_skill_invocation: preplanning/SKILL.md does NOT grep-match '/dso:design-wireframe'
2. test_preplanning_no_skill_tool_invocations: preplanning/SKILL.md does NOT grep-match 'Skill('

Also add to .test-index: plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md → tests/skills/test-skill-nesting-depth.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- Both assertions added in a new test block at the end of test-skill-nesting-depth.sh
- Assertions use the existing assert_eq / _snapshot_fail pattern from the file
- .test-index gains entry: plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-skill-nesting-depth.sh (append to or update existing preplanning line)
- Both assertions PASS (preplanning SKILL.md contains neither pattern after 8163-83a4 runs)
- All existing tests in the file continue to pass

## testing_mode: GREEN
Source behavior (preplanning uses Agent tool for design, not Skill tool) already implemented by 8163-83a4 before this task runs.
